name: MedCare MSO
description: Top medical billing company serving practices across Texas major metros, supporting over 50 clinical specialties for small, mid, and large practices.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: exceptional communication and expertise elevated our RCM experience and my bank accounts!
reduced our claim denials by up to 20% and resolved all of our billing challenges
They excel in revenue cycle management and truly feel like a partner
rectified all the mistakes from my previous billing partner. They are so fast and efficient

sentiment.summary: MedCare MSO has overwhelmingly positive reviews praising their billing expertise, responsive communication, efficiency, and measurable impact on revenue and claim management.
